title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: COASTAL HEALTHCARE NEWPORT OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. 36 SW Nye Street Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Individuals with a income below 250% FPL Hours: Monday/Thursday 7am-6pm, Tuesday-Wednesday/Friday 8am-5pm (541) 265-4947 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 265-4947 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Lincoln County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: County Bus transportation available Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - GENERAL MEDICAL CARE HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COASTAL HEALTHCARE NEWPORT
